title: Transfer $72,500 within Public Works to cover injury-related Judgment and Damages costs
summary: The City Manager requested transferring $72,500 from the Public Works Salary and Wages account to the Public Works Travel and Training (Judgment and Damages) account to cover FY26 costs from on-the-job injuries to Public Works personnel. Adopted unanimously.
body: Transmitting a Communication from Yi-An Huang, City Manager, relative to the Transfer of $72,500 from the General Fund Public Works Salary and Wages account to the General Fund Public Works Travel and Training (Judgment and Damages) account to cover current and projected FY26 costs related to Public Works personnel injured in the course of their job. RESULT: Adopted and CMA placed on file [9-0-0]

vote.result: Adopted and CMA placed on file [9-0-0]

rationale.doc.status:adopted: RESULT: Adopted and CMA placed on file [9-0-0]

title: Plan to align housing and homeless services into a unified Housing Department

body: A communication transmitted from Yi-An Huang, City Manager, relative to a plan to align all housing and homeless services and programs into a unified Housing Department. TABLED IN COUNCIL FEBRUARY 9, 2026. RESULT: Tabled [9-0-0]
